evals.prompt: Perform a thorough audit of the codebase at ~/Documents/graph-dl. Find bugs, security issues, performance problems, and anything else worth fixing. Rank by severity.
evals.expected_output: Structured audit report with categorized findings, severity levels, file paths with line numbers, evidence, suggested fixes, and effort estimates.

assertions.text: Each finding has a severity level (Critical/High/Medium/Low)
Each finding has a category from the taxonomy
Each finding cites specific file paths with line numbers
Each finding includes a suggested fix
Each finding includes an effort estimate
Findings are ordered highest to lowest severity
Report includes Issues Not Found section
